reviews.author: Apsana Deen
reviews.review_body:
A Fun and Well-Organized Parents' Sports Event Chinmaya vidyalaya.
I recently participated in the Parents' Sports Event at Chinmaya vidyalaya, held on 23 Nov 24, and it was an amazing experience. The event was well-organized, with a variety of sports and activities that allowed everyone to get involved. The staff were welcoming and created a positive and energetic environment for parents and students alike. The school's facilities were top-notch, making the day even more enjoyable. I especially appreciated how much effort was put into making this event not just about competition, but about having fun and fostering a sense of community. I highly recommend participating in future events at Chinmaya vidyalaya, and I’m excited for the next one!

reviews.author: AjayKrishnan R
reviews.review_body: I chose Chinmaya School for my children because of its dedication to cultural values and heritage, and I’m extremely pleased with our experience. Since Subhashini Madam took charge, I've noticed a positive shift in the staff's approach, which is now more supportive and engaged. The school effectively balances academics with a variety of activities, providing a well-rounded experience for the students. Recently, I attended a 'Cook with Dad' session, which was a wonderful example of the school’s commitment to parental involvement and community building. I am hopeful that these positive changes continue, benefiting both our children and the school as a whole.

reviews.author: SHIVARAMAKRISHNAN S
reviews.review_body: Principal is very arrogant, doesn't accept complaints.School is only involved in conducting exams and no space for childrens to play and relax. School is money minded,don't damn care about the future of childrens and their well being.

Lovely educational institution. Spiritual  orientation & Dharmic way if life is instilled on the impregnable body, mind & soul of the parents and pupil. A want & need of the hour. Hari Om, 🕉️ Namaste 🙏 is the mantra for one and all. Lord Krishna, the Supreme master, rules here & everywhere.

Krishnam Vandhe Jagathgurum🕉️🙏💐
